creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Peter,

This seems to be a local problem. Wmakerconf just include varargs.h if the
configure script detects it's necessary.

Could you send me more information and i can help you to track what's the
problem, the information i need is:

- Is your ports tree up-to-date?
- Result of `pkg_info` command
- Execute this:
  # cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/wmakerconf
  # make clean
  # make configure

  After send me ./work/wmakerconf-2.12/config.log and config.h

Thanks
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <garga @ freebsdbrasil.com.br>
GnuPG Key: http://www.FreeBSD.org/~garga/pubkey.asc

Fortune favors the lucky.
